{{CargoRelic
|name=Isle Turnip
|class_id=20076
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This turnip comes from an island. It used to be desolate, but after people worked hard to reclaim it, the beach was planted with various vegetables and fruits, promising a good harvest every season. It was a happy ending for all the people involved!
|fame=13
|art=10
|fth=19
|civ=30
|tech=16
|ss1=Fungus Farm: +2%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss2=Fungus Farm: +4%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss3=Fungus Farm: +6%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss4=Fungus Farm: +6%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi
|ss7=Fungus Farm: +6%chance to produce<br>Wonder Fungi<br> (Awakened)
}}
